channel.title: AniCal — Anime Premieres & Finales
channel.description: Upcoming and recent anime premieres and season finales, updated daily.

item.title: Made in Abyss: Mezameru Shinpi — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Sequel to Made in Abyss: Retsujitsu no Ougonkyou.

item.title: BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity — Finale (Ep 13)
item.description: Finale: The fourth and final part of BLEACH: Sennen Kessen-hen . Destruction looms at the end of the Thousand-Year Blood War between the Soul Reapers and Quincies… as the death of the Soul King mirrors the collapse of the Three Worlds, distortions and omens of destruction start to…

item.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Theatrical follow-up to Seishun Buta Yarou wa Santa Claus no Yume wo Minai . "Actually, I’m Touko Kirishima." The audience erupted in excitement upon learning that the true identity of the mysterious, wildly popular internet singer was none other than the nation’s favorite…

item.title: To You in the Beyond — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The story centers on a boy named Kazuki Tsukigase, who transfers to a high school on a remote island to get away from anyone who knows him. Kazuki finds out that there is an inlet on the island where people are rumored to disappear. Exploring the inlet, he encounters an…

item.title: Girls und Panzer: Saishuushou 5 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The fifth film in the six-part Girls und Panzer: Saishuushou film series.

item.title: Blue Box Season 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second season of Ao no Hako .

item.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4 — Finale (Ep 19)
item.description: Finale: The fourth season of Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu . To save his stricken allies, Subaru faces a deadly desert to find the Sage at Pleiades Watchtower. (Source: Crunchyroll News) Note: Lucca Comics & Games pre-screened episode 1 early on November 1, 2025, prior to the…

item.title: Wareware wa Uchuujin — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: One summer in the third grade, a quiet boy named Tsubasa meets Kyotaro, a boy everyone in the class looked up to, and the two become close friends. Within their small world, they share irreplaceable moments—until a small incident suddenly tears them apart. Spanning more than…

item.title: Dara-san of Reiwa — Finale (Ep 13)
item.description: Finale: Clouds blacken the sky and sheets of rain turn the mountain forest into a treacherous maze... A landslide crushes a razor wire fence, and buries a "NO TRESPASSING" sign... Two young siblings wander into a dark world where they do not belong, and a long, horrid shadow rears up…

item.title: Candy Caries — Finale (Ep 24)
item.description: Finale: Ame is a child who loves sweets, and the tooth decay that lives in her mouth called Caries. Caries lives a carefree life inside Ame's mouth and even calls her "Mama", and Ame's body is always at Caries' mercy. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

item.title: Goodbye, Lara — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Long, long ago, there lived a mermaid princess named Lara. She was raised with love by her father, the king of sea and her sisters. One day, Lara fell in love with a human prince who lived on land. It was a forbidden love—one that was not allowed in the world of mermaids.…

item.title: Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Thirty years ago, the world was nearly destroyed by the sudden appearance of unknown "invasive alien species." Humans and these “invasive species” continue to vie for living space, and while humanity’s safety is currently barely secured, the world could be destroyed at any…

item.title: Daemons of the Shadow Realm — Finale (Ep 24)
item.description: Finale: In a remote mountain village under the watchful eyes of two stone guardians, the young Yuru contentedly lives off the land while staying close to the only family he has left—Asa, his precious twin sister. Asa, meanwhile, carries out a mysterious “duty” on behalf of the village…

item.title: The Drops of God — Finale (Ep 24)
item.description: Finale: World-renowned wine critic Yutaka Kanzaki has passed away, leaving behind a wine collection worth over 12 billion yen. His will states that his collection will be given to the one who can identify the origin and year of twelve wines he’s chosen, the “Twelve Apostles”, and one…

item.title: Meitantei Precure! Fushigi na Niwa to Futari no Himitsu — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Movie of Meitantei Precure! .

item.title: The Villager of Level 999 — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Monsters did not always exist in the island country of Hexaldoria, once known as Japan. But, once monsters appeared, their numbers grew in an instant. Eighty percent of the world is now too dangerous for people to live in. With the monsters' arrival, the world bestowed…

item.title: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun Season 4 — Finale (Ep 24)
item.description: Finale: The fourth season of Mairimashita! Iruma-kun. Suzuki Iruma and all thirteen students of the Misfit Class must perform to reach Rank 4 at the Music Festival. (Source: Crunchyroll News)

item.title: Saishuu Gakushou Hibike! Euphonium - Kouhen — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Sequel to Saishuu Gakushou Hibike! Euphonium - Zenpen . Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change.

item.title: Puella Magi Madoka Magica the Movie -Walpurgisnacht: Rising- — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The 10th anniversary online event for the Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica anime revealed that the franchise is getting a new anime film titled Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten . The film will be an official sequel to the Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica: Hangyaku no…

item.title: Shiranuhi — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The short is set in a coastal town in Kumamoto at the tail end of summer 1996. The 10-year-old boy Minato lives a precarious life with his drunkard father. Minato's only source of strength is Ben-chan, a goddess in the form of a young girl that appeared in Benten Island. The…

item.title: Kidou Keisatsu Patlabor EZY File 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second part of Kidou Keisatsu Patlabor EZY . Note: Initially releases on Aug 14, 2026 as a limited theatrical pre-screening.

item.title: Kidou Keisatsu Patlabor EZY File 2 — Finale (Ep 3)
item.description: Finale: The second part of Kidou Keisatsu Patlabor EZY . Note: Initially releases on Aug 14, 2026 as a limited theatrical pre-screening.

item.title: THE RIBBON HERO — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Princess Sapphire of the lost kingdom. Stripped of everything in her homeland, Silverland, by the calamity known as "Nergal," she arrived in Goldland at the very depths of despair. While carrying the weight of her past, she began to find a glimmer of hope through the kindness…

item.title: Boku no Hero Academia: I am a hero too — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Following the broadcast of My Hero Academia Episode 170+1, the series' official website and accounts revealed that a new short anime adapting the "I Am a Hero Too" bonus chapter will tell the story of Eri as a high-schooler when it releases this summer. (Source: Crunchyroll)

item.title: Crayon Shin-chan: Kikikaikai! Ora no Youkai Vacation — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The Nohara family go to Hiroshi's hometown of Akita to attend a famous fireworks festival during the summer. However, an incident causes youkai to escape from their land and will wreak havoc in Akita and in other areas throughout Japan. The Nohara family then go to the land of…

item.title: BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The fourth and final part of BLEACH: Sennen Kessen-hen . Destruction looms at the end of the Thousand-Year Blood War between the Soul Reapers and Quincies… as the death of the Soul King mirrors the collapse of the Three Worlds, distortions and omens of destruction start to…

item.title: Chiikawa: Ningyo no Shima no Himitsu — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Based on a series of Chiikawa comics posted on X by Nagano from March to November 2023, known as the "Siren Arc" . One day, while Chiikawa and Hachiware were relaxing in the square, Usagi suddenly appeared with a flyer stuck to its face. When Hachiware checked the flyer, it was…

item.title: Cyborg 009: Nemesis — Finale (Ep 3)
item.description: Finale: To commemorate the 61st anniversary of the original manga's debut: a new anime based on Shoutarou Ishinomori's Cyborg 009 .

item.title: Cyborg 009: Nemesis — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: To commemorate the 61st anniversary of the original manga's debut: a new anime based on Shoutarou Ishinomori's Cyborg 009 .

item.title: Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The story centers on two Tokyo high schoolers who connect over a painting of fireworks. They trace the painting to the Nagaoka Fireworks Festival in Niigata, one of Japan's three major fireworks festivals, and to a mysterious promise that connects the two to the past. (Source:…

item.title: Though I Am an Inept Villainess — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: As maidens from the Five Clans battle for the Crown Prince’s heart, jealous Keigetsu uses forbidden magic to swap bodies with the beloved Reirin. Switching places does not guarantee happiness for Keigetsu with her new body's ill health leaving her hanging on the verge of death.…

item.title: Plannosaurus Gachi Koseibutsu-bu — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Plannosaurus Gachi Koseibutsu-bu airs episode 1.

item.title: Hanaori-san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Ryuusei Narukami spends his days cooped up in his room playing video games, but hides a secret past as an evil dark lord from a fantasy world reincarnated into our world. He has a fateful encounter with the belligerent Hanaori Meteor, the hero from Ryuusei's world who defeated…

item.title: The Elusive Samurai Season 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second season of Nige Jouzu no Wakagimi .

item.title: Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. 44:CLOUDY BEACH — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Theatrical follow-up to Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. This is the story of a certain insane world. Player name: Yuuki. Occupation: Professional in deadly games. Overcoming the jinx known as the "Thirty Game Wall," which drastically reduces the survival rate of players, Yuuki…

item.title: Unanswered//butterfly: Sword Art Online — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The world’s first full-dive VRMMO, Sword Art Online—known as SAO. What was meant to be a dream come true has instead transformed into a deadly game where dying in the virtual world means dying in reality. Emirun and Rex, who once knew each other in the real world, reunite by…

item.title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: At age forty-five, office worker Sasaki has had enough of the corporate grind. His only solace is smoking-and the friendly smile of supermarket cashier Yamada. When Sasaki can't find Yamada after a particularly trying day, a striking woman invites him to smoke with her. The…

item.title: MEBIUS DUST — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: On February 29, 2000, a group of Möbius meteorites fell down to earth. These meteorites brought new material called Möbius Dust, which dissolves in air and can cause miracles. The day the Möbius meteorites fell was dubbed 2.29, and the economic disparity in Japan increased…

item.title: Thunder 3 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Three ordinary schoolboys come into possession of a DVD that supposedly opens a gateway to a parallel universe, but when their backs are turned Pyontaro's little sister Futaba passes through and gets kidnapped by the aliens that have overrun that version of Earth! Discovering…

item.title: From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman Season 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second season of Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru .

item.title: Trapped in a Dating Sim: The World of Otome Games is Tough for Mobs Season 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second season of Otomege Sekai wa Mob ni Kibishii Sekai desu .

item.title: Ibitte Konai Gibo to Gishi — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Miya is the illegitimate child of a prominent family. When her mother dies and her father’s estate agrees to take her in, she’s convinced she knows what awaits her in her new home: a life of servitude and misery at the hands of her wicked stepmother and stepsisters. Yet when…

item.title: Clevatess Season 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second season of Clevatess: Majuu no Ou to Akago to Kabane no Yuusha .

item.title: Saga of Tanya the Evil Season 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second season of Youjo Senki .

item.title: Majo no Tani no Yoru — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: A short film only screened at the Cinema Orion at Ghibli Park in Nagakute. The film is set in Ghibli Park's "Valley of the Witches" and is the first original animated short film created by Studio Ghibli for Ghibli Park.

item.title: Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Yuri, a pretty Japanese girl, is ecstatic after passing her college entrance exam and having her first kiss with her childhood friend-turned boyfriend. However, her luck soon changes. She starts to notice that water becomes agitated whenever she goes near it. One night, hands…

item.title: Victoria of Many Faces — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: In an age when spies act behind the scenes in every land, Chloe spends her days successfully carrying out even the most difficult missions due to her unparalleled disguise skills and martial arts abilities. After the betrayal of her boss, she suddenly disappears—as Chloe plans…

item.title: Yoroi-Shinden Samurai Troopers Cour 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second part of Yoroi Shinden Samurai Troopers .

item.title: THE GHOST IN THE SHELL — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The year is 2029. In near-future Japan, where the world has become highly information-intensive, with a vast corporate network covering the planet, electrons and light pulsing through it. But the nation-state and ethnic groups still survive. Motoko Kusanagi, a full-body cyborg,…

item.title: I Want to Love You Till Your Dying Day — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: At the mysterious orphanage where Sheena lives, death is nothing new to its residents—girls who no longer have families of their own, who are raised as weapons of war, taught to kill and take the lives of others without batting an eye. Everyone, that is, except Sheena, who…
